headline: Evercore ISI Group Initiates Coverage On Trane Technologies with Outperform Rating, Announces Price Target of $535
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Alexander Virgo   initiates coverage on Trane Technologies (NYSE:TT) with a Outperform rating and announces Price Target of $535.
